title: 2026 Grammy Awards: Best New Artist Predictions
text: According to Variety's Awards Circuit predictions, Olivia Dean is favored to win Best New Artist at the 68th annual Grammy Awards ceremony on February 1, 2026. The nominees include Addison Rae, Alex Warren, Olivia Dean, Katseye, Leon Thomas, Lola Young, The Marías, and Sombr. The publication describes this category as notably different from the previous year, when it was deemed straightforward. Variety editors express confidence in Dean's likelihood of winning, despite her having only one nomination overall—a detail shared with most competitors. However, Leon Thomas stands apart with six nominations total. The analysts note that chart winds shifted dramatically between nominations and final voting, with Dean's album achieving significant commercial success and securing a sold-out tour with high resale prices. Alternative possibilities include Leon Thomas and Sombr who could potentially upset the favorite. The prediction acknowledges Dean's career trajectory suggests multiple future Grammy opportunities regardless of this year's outcome.
